steps.title: Read the cost at $x = 50$ from the graph
steps.content: The cost $y$ is given by the line shown. Locate $x = 50$ on the horizontal axis and trace up to the line, then read across to the $y$-value.

steps.title: Identify the matching value
steps.content:
At $x = 50$ rings, the line gives a cost of $y = 175$ dollars.

That matches Choice C — 175.
